text:
Universal Survey (なんでもアンケート) is a card found in the Greed Island game. It is one of the game's 100 designated slot cards and is required for a player to complete the game. Give this survey to somebody and they will answer all the questions truthfully.

Summary

Universal Survey なんでもアンケート - This card grants the user the ability to find out what people truly think about you. Write a set of questions about yourself, and whoever you give it to, will answer all of the questions honestly. (This is reusable)

Card Description

{| border="0" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" class="article-table" style="height: 10px; color: #1A004C; background-color: #EEFFEE"
![Jap]
|No.034 :: なんでもアンケート 
この用紙にあなたに関する様々な質問を書いて人に渡すと、渡された人は全ての質問に正直に答えてくれる。何度でも使える。 
|-
![Eng]
|No.034 :: Universal Survey 
If you pass to a person the paper you have written various questions about yourself on, who you passed too will have answered them all honestly to all questions. Can be used many times.
|}
